text:
116
This native's father will have two marriages. The native will be a noble
man and rich also. The mother will be noble lady.
The disciple questions, "The Sun representing father is conjunct Jupiter
and the Moon. All the 3 have no planets in the 7th house to them and the Lord
of the seventh Mars' is in Pisces with Venus and Ketu. Hence I think the native
had only one mother and a noble one too.

IMPORTANT CHARTS 79
The Master answers--Yes, the
Mars Sun
seventh Lord Mars is in Pisces con
Ven. Mer. Moon
junct Venus. Venus, Lord of both Tau
Dt. Jupt.
rus and Libra the 6th house from Tau
Sat. rus is having exchange of places with
Jupiter in Taurus. So the Sun will have
the effect of being conjunct with the
Moon and Venus both female planets.
So the father will marry twice. The
Dh. father will die when the native is 39-40
years old as a result of an operation.
When Saturn transits Virgo he comes in contact with Rahu receiving aspect
from Venus, Mars and Ketu.
